title: AI Superpowers
author: Kai-Fu Lee
subline: China, Silicon Valley, and the new world order.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A literal brain scan: two side-by-side profile silhouettes (left = US, right = China), each filled with a circuit-board pattern. The two halves meet in the middle, where a red lightning bolt connects them. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1280)" fill="none">
    <!-- Left brain (US-style) -->
    <path d="M -60 -200 C -160 -200 -260 -160 -300 -100 C -340 -40 -340 40 -300 100 C -260 160 -180 200 -100 200 L -100 220 L -60 220 Z" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Right brain (China-style) -->
    <path d="M 60 -200 C 160 -200 260 -160 300 -100 C 340 -40 340 40 300 100 C 260 160 180 200 100 200 L 100 220 L 60 220 Z" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Circuit lines inside left brain (US) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6" fill="none">
      <path d="M -280 -60 L -200 -60 L -200 -120 L -120 -120"/>
      <path d="M -280 -20 L -180 -20"/>
      <path d="M -260 40 L -200 40 L -200 100 L -120 100"/>
      <path d="M -240 140 L -160 140"/>
      <circle cx="-280" cy="-60" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="-120" cy="-120" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="-180" cy="-20" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="-260" cy="40" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="-120" cy="100" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="-160" cy="140" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Circuit lines inside right brain (China) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.6" fill="none">
      <path d="M 280 -60 L 200 -60 L 200 -120 L 120 -120"/>
      <path d="M 280 -20 L 180 -20"/>
      <path d="M 260 40 L 200 40 L 200 100 L 120 100"/>
      <path d="M 240 140 L 160 140"/>
      <circle cx="280" cy="-60" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="120" cy="-120" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="180" cy="-20" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="260" cy="40" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="120" cy="100" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
      <circle cx="160" cy="140" r="3" fill="#cccccc"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A red lightning bolt at the seam between the two brains -->
    <path d="M 0 -200 L -30 -50 L 20 -50 L -10 200 L 30 0 L -20 0 L 10 -200 Z" fill="#fc1c46" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- Labels -->
    <text x="-220" y="-260" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">US</text>
    <text x="220" y="-260" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.2em">CHINA</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The book IS the geopolitical AI race. Two side-by-side brain profiles — left labeled US, right labeled CHINA — each filled with circuit-board lines and node dots. A massive red lightning bolt runs down the seam between them, connecting the two 'superpowers'. The lightning is the only red element, and it cuts the cover in half. Title sits overlaid in the middle, weight 500 command, mixed-case. Brand 'US × CHINA' in the bottom-right; pill '40% JOBS' at the bottom — Lee's estimate of jobs that will be replaced.
